mood.label: CAUTIOUSLY-RISK-OFF
mood.summary: US futures are pointing to a slightly lower open after a mixed session in Asia and a flat start in Europe. Key focus will be on upcoming economic data for clues on inflation and growth.

indicesNarrative: U.S. index futures are slightly down, indicating a cautious start to the trading day. The Dow is showing the most weakness in the pre-market session. European markets are mixed, while Asian markets saw varied performance overnight, with Japan's Nikkei gaining while Hong Kong's Hang Seng edged lower.
sectorsNarrative: Sector performance from the previous session was mixed. Technology and high-growth sectors will be in focus today, especially with ongoing discussions around AI infrastructure spending.
industryNarrative: Semiconductor and AI-related industries continue to be a primary focus for traders. Cybersecurity stocks may also see activity ahead of earnings reports.

movers.why: Positive earnings report and strong guidance.
movers.traderLens: Qullamaggie - Episodic pivot on earnings surprise.

traderLens.name: Minervini
traderLens.view: Market is in a confirmed uptrend, but some chop is expected. Focus on A-grade setups with strong relative strength.

traderLens.name: Ted Zhang
traderLens.view: Money is flowing into AI and semiconductor stocks. Stay with the trend.

traderLens.name: Clement Ang
traderLens.view: The market is a bit extended. It's a time to be selective and not chase extended names.

traderLens.name: SRxTrades
traderLens.view: Look for clean pivots and volume confirmation. Avoid chasing gaps.

traderLens.name: Jeff
traderLens.view: Stick to your trading plan. Honor your stops.

traderLens.name: Qullamaggie
traderLens.view: Look for episodic pivots on strong earnings or news. Be ready to act decisively when a setup triggers.

traderLens.name: Composite
traderLens.view: The market is cautiously optimistic. Focus on longs in strong sectors like AI and semis, but be mindful of extended conditions. Keep stops tight.
